query:
SELECT
  c.incident_description,
  c.normalised_description,
  a.physics_analysis,
  a.damage_description,
  a.damaged_components_json,
  a.cost_intelligence_json,
  a.enriched_photos_json,
  a.damage_photos_json,
  a.photo_inconsistencies_json,
  a.consistency_check_json,
  a.inferred_hidden_damages_json,
  a.pipeline_run_summary
FROM ai_assessments a
JOIN claims c ON c.id = a.claim_id
WHERE a.claim_id = 2730001
LIMIT 1;
